query: Show top 5 movies by IMDb rating.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie m ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 5

query: Count the number of movies in each genre, sorted by count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, COUNT(mg.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Genre g JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON g.genre_id = mg.genre_id GROUP BY g.genre ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find all movies released in 2019 with an IMDb rating above 7.5.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie m WHERE m.year = 2019 AND m.imdb_rating > 7.5 ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Which actors appear in more than 3 movies in this dataset? Show actor name and movie count, sorted by count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT A.actor_name, COUNT(MA.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Actor AS A JOIN Movie_Actor AS MA ON A.actor_id = MA.actor_id GROUP BY A.actor_id, A.actor_name HAVING COUNT(MA.movie_id) > 3 ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 50

query: Show the average Metacritic score for each genre. Only include genres that have at least 10 movies with a Metacritic score available. Sort by average score descending.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, AVG(m.meta_score) AS average_meta_score FROM Movie AS m JOIN Movie_Genre AS mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre AS g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE m.meta_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.genre HAVING COUNT(m.movie_id) >= 10 ORDER BY average_meta_score DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find the top 5 directors by average IMDb rating, among those who have directed at least 3 movies in this dataset.
generated_sql: SELECT d.director_name, ROUND(AVG(m.imdb_rating), 2) AS average_rating FROM Director d JOIN Movie m ON d.director_id = m.director_id GROUP BY d.director_id, d.director_name HAVING COUNT(m.movie_id) >= 3 ORDER BY average_rating DESC LIMIT 5

query: Show all movies with more than 1,000,000 votes, sorted by vote count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT movie_id, title, year, votes, imdb_rating FROM Movie WHERE votes > 1000000 ORDER BY votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find movies that belong to BOTH the Drama AND Crime genres.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie AS m JOIN Movie_Genre AS mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre AS g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE g.genre IN ('Drama', 'Crime') GROUP BY m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT g.genre_id) = 2

query: Find directors who have directed at least 2 movies in this dataset and whose average IMDb rating across all their movies is above 8.0. Show director name and average rating.
generated_sql: SELECT d.director_name, ROUND(AVG(m.imdb_rating), 2) AS average_rating FROM Director AS d JOIN Movie AS m ON d.director_id = m.director_id GROUP BY d.director_id, d.director_name HAVING COUNT(m.movie_id) >= 2 AND AVG(m.imdb_rating) > 8.0 ORDER BY average_rating DESC, COUNT(m.movie_id) DESC LIMIT 50

query: Show actors who appear exclusively in movies with an IMDb rating above 8.0. Show actor name and how many movies they appear in.
generated_sql: SELECT a.actor_name, COUNT(ma.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Actor AS a JOIN Movie_Actor AS ma ON a.actor_id = ma.actor_id JOIN Movie AS m ON ma.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE a.actor_id NOT IN ( SELECT ma_sub.actor_id FROM Movie_Actor AS ma_sub JOIN Movie AS m_sub ON ma_sub.movie_id = m_sub.movie_id WHERE m_sub.imdb_rating <= 8.0 OR m_sub.imdb_rating IS NULL ) GROUP BY a.actor_id, a.actor_name

query: For each genre, find the highest-rated movie. Show genre name, movie title, and its IMDb rating.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, m.title, m.imdb_rating FROM Genre AS g JOIN Movie_Genre AS mg ON g.genre_id = mg.genre_id JOIN Movie AS m ON mg.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE m.movie_id IN ( SELECT m_inner.movie_id FROM Movie AS m_inner JOIN Movie_Genre AS mg_inner ON m_inner.movie_id = mg_inner.movie_id WHERE mg_inner.genre_id = g.genre_id ORDER BY m_inner.imdb_rating DESC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY g.genre

query: List the top 10 R-rated movies released after 2010, sorted by IMDb rating descending. Show title, year, and rating.
generated_sql: SELECT title, year, imdb_rating FROM Movie WHERE certificate = 'R' AND year > 2010 ORDER BY imdb_rating DESC, votes DESC LIMIT 10

query: Find actors whose career in this dataset spans at least 20 years (from their earliest to latest movie). Show actor name, first year, last year, career span, and number of movies. Sort by span descending.
generated_sql: SELECT A.actor_name, MIN(M.year) AS first_year, MAX(M.year) AS last_year, (MAX(M.year) - MIN(M.year)) AS career_span, COUNT(M.movie_id) AS number_of_movies FROM Actor AS A JOIN Movie_Actor AS MA ON A.actor_id = MA.actor_id JOIN Movie AS M ON MA.movie_id = M.movie_id GROUP BY A.actor_id, A.actor_name HAVING (MAX(M.year) - MIN(M.year)) >= 20 ORDER BY career_span DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find people who are listed as both a director and an actor in this dataset. Show their names sorted alphabetically.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.director_name FROM Director AS T1 INTERSECT SELECT T2.actor_name FROM Actor AS T2 ORDER BY T1.director_name LIMIT 50

query: Find the top 10 movies with the largest discrepancy between IMDb rating (scaled to 0-100) and Metacritic score. Show title, IMDb rating, Metacritic score, and the absolute difference. Only include movies that have both scores.
generated_sql: SELECT m.title, m.imdb_rating, m.meta_score, ABS((m.imdb_rating * 10) - m.meta_score) AS score_discrepancy FROM Movie AS m WHERE m.imdb_rating IS NOT NULL AND m.meta_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY score_discrepancy DESC LIMIT 10
